title: ArmorSkin
body: # ArmorSkin [![HitCount](http://hits.dwyl.com/IzzyDotExe/ArmorSkin.svg?style=flat)](http://hits.dwyl.com/IzzyDotExe/ArmorSkin) [![master](https://github.com/IzzyDotExe/ArmorSkin/actions/workflows/build.yml/badge.svg?branch=master)](https://github.com/IzzyDotExe/ArmorSkin/actions/workflows/build.yml) ![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/IzzyDotExe/ArmorSkin/total) ![Commits](https://img.shields.io/github/commit-activity/m/IzzyDotExe/ArmorSkin) Minecraft fabric mod that shows armor types in the armor status bar. ![Image1](https://i.imgur.com/cDZNmcO.png) ![Image2](https://i.imgur.com/Fi7bpCK.png) Need help? or have questions? [Join my discord!](https://discord.gg/cVFc6Mr)
